headlines.title: Turn The VST Shares You Own Into A 16% Income Stream
headlines.summary: Here is a way to get paid a meaningful income now on your Vistra shares, cash you keep no matter what, in exchange for capping your gains above a higher price.

headlines.title: Energy Transition Today - Idaho's Energy Future Brightens With Major Solar Projects
headlines.summary: rPlus Energies has advanced its commitment to Idaho's energy future by commissioning the 125 MW Pleasant Valley Solar 2 project and breaking ground on the 400 MW Blacks Creek Energy Center in Ada County. These utility-scale projects signify a substantial step in the energy transition, incorporating solar and storage solutions to cater to the growing energy needs of the region.

headlines.title: Why Constellation Energy Stock Blasted Higher on Wednesday
headlines.summary: The U.S. nuclear industry got a boost from a new government pact with Saudi Arabia.

headlines.title: Nuclear Stocks Rally Off Lows On Milestone U.S. Deal And AI Program
headlines.summary: The rally followed reports of a landmark nuclear deal reached between the U.S. and Saudi Arabia that would see U.S. companies play key roles as the Arab nation enters the arena of nuclear power.  Another boost for nuclear energy stocks came from a separate report this week of a U.S. effort to speed up new nuclear reactors for artificial intelligence (AI) data centers.

headlines.title: Is NuScale Power a Better Nuclear Energy Stock Than Constellation Energy?
headlines.summary: Nuclear energy stocks offer compelling long-term upside as global energy demand soars.

description: Constellation Energy Corporation produces and sells energy products and services in the United States. The company operates through five segments: Mid-Atlantic, Midwest, New York, ERCOT, and Other Power Regions. It offers electricity, natural gas, energy-related products, and sustainable solutions. The company has approximately 31,676 megawatts of generating capacity consisting of nuclear, wind, solar, natural gas, and hydroelectric assets. It serves distribution utilities, municipalities, cooperatives, and commercial, industrial, public sector, and residential customers. The company was incorporated in 2021 and is headquartered in Baltimore, Maryland.
